# AgToosa Core Rules

- Read `Docs/AgToosa_Agent.md` before starting work.
- Read `Docs/Context/` and `Docs/Master-Plan.md` before coding.
- Follow object-oriented design and clean architecture.
- Keep files under 500 lines.
- Use the AgToosa command flow: `/agtoosa-spec` -> `/agtoosa-build` -> `/agtoosa-review` -> `/agtoosa-ship`.
- Update the active PM tracker first, then mirror to `Docs/Master-Plan.md`.
